about.metaDescription: Nordic Works is a B2B SaaS company that brings Nordic-style work practices to Japanese teams. Mission, values, and company information.

hero.label: About
hero.title: Bringing Nordic wisdom to the Japanese workplace.
hero.description: Nordic Works is a B2B SaaS company that translates Nordic-style work — remote work, psychological safety, organisation design — into data and implementation for Japanese teams. We don't leave "good places to work" as a feeling; we measure, design, and improve them.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Turn good workplaces into a repeatable "design".
mission.body: Great organisational cultures often rely on the intuition of a few star executives or the lucky history of specific companies. We translate that into a design that anyone can learn, adopt, and operate. Bringing the work wisdom Nordic countries have built over decades into a form Japanese organisations can use today — that is what Nordic Works exists for.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: We disclose the rationale behind every decision. Removing information asymmetry is the foundation for trust and autonomy.

safety.title: Psychological Safety
safety.body: An environment where people speak up honestly determines how fast a team learns. We practise it ourselves and feed those learnings back into our products.

data.title: Data × Humanity
data.body: We quantify organisational problems but make the final call in human context. We refuse to let go of either the numbers or the story.

business.label: Business
business.value: Development and delivery of B2B SaaS for organisation development and workplace improvement
